summary: A Fox & Friends television interview segment with a federal official (split-screen with footage of Gov. Tim Walz) under a chyron reading 'WALZ DEFLECTS BLAME FOR FRAUD ON TAXPAYER DIME.' The long talking-head transcript about sanctuary jurisdictions and Minnesota fraud confirms this is a recorded cable-news interview, not produced entertainment content.
notable_text: WALZ DEFLECTS BLAME FOR FRAUD ON TAXPAYER DIME; FOX NEWS; Fox & Friends
